form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 19.51 when third at Bulli latest but the run prior she clocked an outstanding 17.52 over 324m when narrowly beaten, at this track. Looms as the one to beat this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.02) at Gosford in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 26 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from three starts. Can feature in the finish.
